# POST /api/pages

**Create new page**

Register a new page/screen and auto-generate 4 CRUD permissions (VIEW, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE)

Operation ID: `createPage`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: PAGE_CREATE (found on service:PageService)

## Request Body

Schema: `CreatePageRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| pageCode | string | Yes | maxLength: 50 | Unique page code (will be normalized to uppercase) | USER |
| nameAr | string | Yes | maxLength: 100 | Arabic name for the page | إدارة المستخدمين |
| nameEn | string | Yes | maxLength: 100 | English name for the page | User Management |
| route | string | Yes | maxLength: 200 | Angular route path | /admin/users |
| icon | string | No | maxLength: 50 | Icon class or name | pi pi-users |
| module | string | No | maxLength: 50 | Module grouping | SECURITY |
| parentId | integer (int64) | No |  | Parent page ID for hierarchical structure |  |
| displayOrder | integer (int32) | No |  | Display order for sorting | 10 |
| active | boolean | No |  | Active status | True |
| description | string | No | maxLength: 500 | Optional description |  |

**Request Example**

_(partial — only fields with a documented example are shown)_

```json
{
  "pageCode": "USER",
  "nameAr": "إدارة المستخدمين",
  "nameEn": "User Management",
  "route": "/admin/users",
  "icon": "pi pi-users",
  "module": "SECURITY",
  "displayOrder": 10,
  "active": "True"
}
```

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `PageResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  | Page ID | 1 |
| pageCode | string | No |  | Page code (uppercase) | USER |
| nameAr | string | No |  | Arabic name | إدارة المستخدمين |
| nameEn | string | No |  | English name | User Management |
| route | string | No |  | Route path | /admin/users |
| icon | string | No |  | Icon | pi pi-users |
| module | string | No |  | Module | SECURITY |
| parentId | integer (int64) | No |  | Parent page ID |  |
| displayOrder | integer (int32) | No |  | Display order |  |
| active | boolean | No |  | Active status |  |
| description | string | No |  | Description |  |
| permissionKeys | object | No |  | Auto-generated permission keys (VIEW, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) |  |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Created timestamp |  |
| createdBy | string | No |  | Created by username |  |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Updated timestamp |  |
| updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by username |  |

## Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| FORBIDDEN | FORBIDDEN | A specific permission check was found for this endpoint (@PreAuthorize/@Secured); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AccessDeniedException to this status. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |
